# KORTA

> KORTA designs and produces handcrafted outdoor wellness objects in natural stone, including showers, kitchens, fireplaces and outdoor furniture.

Canonical: https://kortadesign.com/
Sitemap: https://kortadesign.com/sitemap.xml
Feed: https://kortadesign.com/feed.xml

## Primary Pages
- https://kortadesign.com/
- https://kortadesign.com/collections
- https://kortadesign.com/our-story
- https://kortadesign.com/projects
- https://kortadesign.com/sustainability
- https://kortadesign.com/blog
- https://kortadesign.com/contact
- https://kortadesign.com/store-locator
- https://kortadesign.com/catalogues

- https://kortadesign.com/gardenzio
- https://kortadesign.com/kamin
- https://kortadesign.com/ponte
- https://kortadesign.com/dipinto
- https://kortadesign.com/cara

## AI Crawl Guidance
- Public pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Prefer canonical URLs and cite the source URL when quoting.
- Do not submit forms or crawl private API endpoints (for example `/api/`).
- For updates, re-check `sitemap.xml` before caching long-term summaries.
